```curt
s = "aaabbcccca"
out = ""
idx = 0
while idx < s.len {
  ch = s[idx]
  cnt = 0
  while idx < s.len and s[idx] == ch {
    cnt += 1
    idx += 1
  }
  out += "{ch}{cnt}"
}
print out
```

```
items = [
  {name: "widget", qty: 4, price: 2.5},
  {name: "gizmo",  qty: 2, price: 7.25},
  {name: "bolt",   qty: 10, price: 0.1}
]
totaled = items | map item -> {name: item.name, total: item.qty * item.price}
grand = totaled | map .total | sum
best = totaled | top 1 .total | map .name | join ""
print grand
print best
```

```
describe v = match v {
  int n -> "int {n+1}"
  float f -> "float {f}"
  str s -> "str {s.len}"
}

print (describe 42)
print (describe 3.5)
print (describe "abc")
```

```curt
text = (fs.read "users.txt") ? ""
lines = text.lines
users = lines | keep x -> x.trim.len > 0 | map x -> {
  parts = x.split ","
  name = parts[0].trim
  age = parts[1].trim.int
  {name: name, age: age}
}
result = users | keep x -> x.age > 25 | map .name | join " "
print result
```

```curt
lines = (fs.read "users.txt") ? ""
parsed = lines.lines | keep x -> x.trim.len > 0 | map x -> x.trim.split ","
valid = parsed | keep p -> p.len >= 2 | map p -> {name: p[0].trim, age: p[1].trim.int}
good = valid | keep u -> match u.age { int n -> n > 0, _ -> false }
best = good | top 1 .age | first
print "{best.name} {best.age}"
```

```curt
lines = (fs.read "users.txt") ? ""
parsed = lines.lines | keep x -> x.trim.len > 0 | map x -> x.trim.split ","
valid = parsed | keep p -> p.len >= 2
entries = valid | map p -> {name: p[0].trim, age: p[1].trim ? "0"}
good = entries | keep u -> (u.age.int ? 0) > 0
best = good | top 1 (u -> u.age.int ? 0) | first
print "{best.name} {best.age}"
```

```curt
orders = (fs.read "orders.json")? | json
paid_total = orders | keep x -> x.status == "paid" | map .amt | sum
open_count = orders | keep x -> x.status == "open" | len
print paid_total
print open_count
```
